title: potentilla galiciana
intro: Potentilla galiciana, also known as Silverweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, including anti-aging and antioxidant effects. Potentilla galiciana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine.
